signals.title: Verenigd Koninkrijk verlaagt kapitaalbuffers voor stablecoins onder MiCA-niveau
signals.summary: UK to lower stablecoin capital buffers, undercutting EU's MiCA requirements

signals.title: Breez lanceert Bitcoin-naar-stablecoin-betalingen op meer dan 30 blockchains
signals.summary: The new SDK feature lets developers route payments from Bitcoin balances to recipients in USDC and USDT without requiring users to hold stablecoins.

signals.title: EBA publiceert ontwerpmethodologie voor boeterollen onder MiCA
signals.summary: ​The European Banking Authority (EBA) published today a Consultation Paper with a draft methodology for setting fines in its role as supervisor under MiCA. The objective is to ensure that fines imposed on issuers of significant crypto-assets are consistent, proportionate and transparent, and effectively support compliance with the regulatory framework.

signals.title: Spiko integreert Coinbase-betalingen in EU-gereglementeerde UCITS-fondsen
signals.summary: Spiko integrated Coinbase Payments into two EU regulated UCITS Treasury funds, enabling USDC and EURC subscriptions and redemption payments through Base.

signals.title: New York Life start tokenisering met Centrifuge voor bedrijfsobligatiefonds
signals.summary: The tokenized fund will enable eligible investors to access NYLIM’s established institutional high-yield strategy.

signals.title: EU-depositogarantiefondsreserves bereiken 85 miljard euro eind 2025
signals.summary: The European Banking Authority (EBA) today published end-2025 data on two key concepts and indicators in the DGSD, namely financial means available to, and covered deposits protected by DGSs. This annual publication, covering each Member State, enhances transparency and accountability across the EU to the benefit of depositors, markets, policymakers, DGSs and Members States.

signals.title: ESMA waarschuwing: Binance moet MiCA-geautoriseerde entiteit gebruiken in EU
signals.summary: ESMA said EU crypto clients must be served through a MiCA-authorized entity as Binance faces questions over its servicing model in the region after the MiCA deadline.

signals.title: ECB publiceert indicatieve operationele kalenders voor 2028
signals.summary: ECB publishes indicative operational calendars for 2028
